title: Bitdeer Convertible Notes Offering for Expansion
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group announced pricing of US$330.0 million principal amount of 4.875% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The company granted initial purchasers an option to purchase up to an additional US$45.0 million principal amount, reaching potential $375 million total. Bitdeer investors receive 4.875% annual interest on the convertible notes until 2031, with the ability to convert notes at 25% higher than the company's current stock price. The firm planned to use approximately $160 million to pay off zero-strike call options and cash consideration for note exchanges, with the remainder for ASIC mining rig expansions, working capital, and general company purposes. Bitdeer has conducted multiple convertible note offerings in recent periods: August 2024 saw a $150 million offering, November 2024 a $360 million offering, and February 2026 a US$325 million Rule 144A issuance of 5.00% senior unsecured convertible notes due 2032. These successive capital raises demonstrate Bitdeer's aggressive expansion strategy and need for funding major infrastructure projects including the Tydal AI data center and Rockdale power expansion.
